title: jasminum azoricum
intro: Jasminum azoricum, also known as Madeira Jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Jasminum azoricum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
